name: OFF THE GREEN Indoor Golf
about: OFF THE GREEN Indoor Golf features five state-of-the-art golf simulators that transport players to iconic courses worldwide, offering detailed graphics, accurate ball tracking, and real-time feedback. The facility provides a relaxed, enjoyable atmosphere suitable for all skill levels, with a focus on both technology and the overall experience. Available activities include access to over 1,000 pro courses, putt-putt, par 3 courses, scrambles, a driving range, and a large real-feel putting green with eternal turf.
why_golfers_like_it: State-of-the-art simulators with 1,000+ pro courses for diverse playing experiences
Relaxed, fun atmosphere welcoming to all skill levels and groups
On-site pro shop with club fittings, repairs, and gear from IDEAL Golf
Realistic putting surface with eternal turf for authentic practice

food_and_drink.notes: Beer, hard seltzers, and soft drinks available for purchase

faq.question: Do I need to bring my own clubs?
faq.answer: You can bring your own clubs or rent them if needed. The pro shop also offers club fittings and repairs.

faq.question: Can I bring my own food and drinks?
faq.answer: The venue has its own selection of beverages including beer, hard seltzers, and soft drinks, along with snacks available for purchase.

faq.question: How long does it take to play 18 holes?
faq.answer: The time to play 18 holes can vary depending on the simulator setup and number of players in your bay, but typically ranges from 1.5 to 2 hours.

faq.question: Is the venue kid-friendly?
faq.answer: Yes, OFF THE GREEN Indoor Golf is family-friendly and welcomes players of all ages and skill levels.
